fields.Name: HubSpot - Get Contact
fields.Description: Retrieves a single Contact record from HubSpot by its external ID

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The unique ID of the Contact record to retrieve

fields.Name: Record
fields.Description: The retrieved Contact record with all fields

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The external ID of the retrieved record

fields.Name: lifecyclestage
fields.Description: Contact lifecycle stage (subscriber, lead, opportunity, customer, etc.)

fields.Name: lastmodifieddate
fields.Description: When the contact was last modified

fields.Name: HubSpot - Create Contact
fields.Description: Creates a new Contact record in HubSpot

fields.Name: lifecyclestage
fields.Description: Contact lifecycle stage (subscriber, lead, opportunity, customer, etc.)

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The external ID of the newly created Contact record
Create not supported by this connector

fields.Name: HubSpot - Update Contact
fields.Description: Updates an existing Contact record in HubSpot. Only provided fields are changed.

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The external ID of the Contact record to update

fields.Name: lifecyclestage
fields.Description: Contact lifecycle stage (subscriber, lead, opportunity, customer, etc.)

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The external ID of the updated record
Update not supported by this connector

fields.Name: HubSpot - Delete Contact
fields.Description: Deletes (archives) a Contact record from HubSpot

fields.Name: ExternalID
fields.Description: The external ID of the Contact record to delete
Delete not supported by this connector

fields.Name: HubSpot - Search Contact
fields.Description: Searches for Contact records in HubSpot matching the given field filters

fields.Name: PageSize
fields.Description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 100)

fields.Name: lifecyclestage
fields.Description: Contact lifecycle stage (subscriber, lead, opportunity, customer, etc.)

fields.Name: lastmodifieddate
fields.Description: When the contact was last modified

fields.Name: HasMore
fields.Description: Whether more pages of results exist

fields.Name: HubSpot - List Contact
fields.Description: Lists Contact records from HubSpot with cursor-based pagination

fields.Name: PageSize
fields.Description: Maximum number of records to return per page (default: 100)

fields.Name: Cursor
fields.Description: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page (from previous ListResult)

fields.Name: Records
fields.Description: Array of Contact records in this page

fields.Name: HasMore
fields.Description: Whether more pages of results exist

fields.Name: NextCursor
fields.Description: Cursor to pass for the next page

fields.Name: TotalCount
fields.Description: Total number of records, if known
